sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-05-17 06:49
- Distance: 12 km
- Moving time: 1:07:50
- Elapsed time: 1:12:27
- Elevation gain: 138.6 m
- Average heart rate: 162.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 177 bpm
- Average watts: 203.4 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `160.8 bpm`, ranging from `146.2` to `166.4 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `158.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `166.4 bpm` (+7.5 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `155.9 spm`, with a working range of `139.6` to `170.3 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `158.1 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `153.6 spm` (-4.5 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:39 /km` across `12.001 km` in `1:07:50` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:24 /km` and second-half pace was `5:55 /km` (+31 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `162.4 bpm` average and `177 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.1 bpm` in the first half and `166.3 bpm` in the second (+8.2 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:07:50` out of `1:12:27` elapsed (93.6%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `17` stop segments and `2.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `170.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `69.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `62.2 m` in the first half and `108.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
